# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deployment

on:
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Set up environment
        run: |
          echo "Setting up environment variables"
          # Add any environment setup commands here

      - name: Run custom build script
        run: |
          if [ -f ./build.sh ]; then
            chmod +x ./build.sh
            ./build.sh
          else
            echo "No build script found."
          fi

      - name: Run custom deployment commands
        run: |
          if [ -f ./deploy.sh ]; then
            chmod +x ./deploy.sh
            ./deploy.sh
          else
            echo "No deployment script found."
          fi

      - name: Cleanup
        run: |
          echo "Cleaning up after build and deployment"
          # Add any cleanup commands here

permissions:
  contents: read
  id-token: write
  actions: read
  checks: write
  deployments: write
  issues: read
  pull-requests: read
  statuses: write
  workflows: read
